steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The opening phrase "Assembling ___ by hand" refers to what the artist assembles. The only logical antecedent is "her massive collage-based paintings," which is plural and needs an object pronoun.

steps.title: Test the pronouns
steps.content: A is singular, B is not the right standalone object pronoun here, and C would make the artist the thing being assembled. A plural object pronoun correctly refers to the paintings. The answer is D.
